title: Evidence: add slog.Error to Emit() silent error drop
description: emitter.go:24-28 silently drops errors in go func(). Add slog.Error for visibility. See docs/plans/2026-02-25-audit-gaps-design.md B1

title: Fix root Docker tests that require missing specs and workstream fixtures
description: Root module Docker tests currently fail because packages such as cmd/sdp-evidence, internal/evidenceenv, and internal/orchestrate expect specs or workstream fixtures that are not present at the mounted repository paths. Reproduce under Docker, identify the missing fixture contract, and make the tests path-stable.
close_reason: Root Docker tests now use self-contained evidence and workstream fixtures inside the sdp repo

title: Prompts: few-shot examples for @review, @build, @idea
description: Add 2-3 examples per skill showing good/bad outputs. See design doc B10

title: Verifier: wire real coverage checking
description: VerifyCoverage always returns true (placeholder). Wire existing quality.Checker. See design doc B7

title: Executor: replace mock with WorkstreamRunner interface
description: retry.go:64-79 executeWorkstreamMock is production code with hardcoded ws ID. Extract WorkstreamRunner interface, move mock to test. See design doc B3

title: Adopt JetBrains modern Go guidelines across sdp
description: Adopt JetBrains/go-modern-guidelines in canonical prompt/docs surfaces, audit the full sdp Go codebase for Go 1.26 modernization opportunities, and ship a separate polishing PR with safe mechanical refactors plus verification evidence.
close_reason: Delivered in PR #110; remaining work tracked in sdp-b8p and sdp-0u6

title: Verifier: VerifyCommands uses context.Background() - ignores parent cancellation
Schema: create ws-verdict.schema.json
description: Formalize quality gates and AC evidence structure. See design doc B9

title: Continue second-wave modern Go cleanup across sdp
description: Second-wave follow-up after the first modern Go polish PR. Continue the repo-wide modernize backlog for safe 1.26 idioms not included in the first batch, including broader any replacements, collection helpers, and other low-risk cleanups grouped into reviewable commits.
notes: PR #110 now has a clean focused modernize audit for ./internal/ciloop ./internal/orchestrate; for sdp-plugin ./internal/verify ./internal/parser ./internal/memory ./internal/executor ./internal/context ./internal/beads ./internal/checkpoint; and for ./src/sdp/agents ./src/sdp/graph ./src/sdp/hooks ./src/sdp/model. Follow-up waves also cleaned ./src/sdp/monitoring ./internal/evidenceenv ./sdp-plugin/internal/session ./internal/notification ./internal/sdpinit ./internal/coordination and now ./src/sdp/runtime with Docker build/test/vet verification. Remaining second-wave work is now broader repo backlog outside these cleaned package sets and should start from a fresh repo-wide audit snapshot. Defer `omitzero` and `sync.WaitGroup.Go` suggestions unless a package-specific review confirms semantics and tooling compatibility.

title: Evidence: singleton Writer + flock for hash chain integrity
description: writer.go: NewWriter per call makes mutex useless. emitSync creates new Writer every time. Fix: singleton via sync.Once + flock for inter-process safety. See design doc B2

title: Config: Load() never calls Validate() - invalid config can propagate

description: Formalize 7 required reviewer roles and verdict structure. See design doc B8

description: Add 5-step evaluation structure for subagents. Add synthesis phase with conflict/coverage check. See design doc B11

description: Replace fmt.Printf with slog in evidence and executor packages. Keep fmt for CLI user-facing output. See design doc B13
